The profile's conscientiousness and low neuroticism make them responsive to strategic arguments and evidence of effective alliances.

request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force strategist, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. The numbers don't lie - NATO allies contribute over 60% of the defense spending in Europe. That's real burden-sharing. Some politicians talk tough but forget that strong alliances mean we don't have to go it alone. Remember when we had to evacuate Kabul? Our allies had our backs. That's the kind of security we build together. #StrongerTogether #AllianceMatters
